role: Wife of Reza Pahlavi; Iranian exile community figure
bio:
Yasmine Etemad-Amini is the wife of [Reza Pahlavi](/people/reza-pahlavi), whom she married in 1986. They have three daughters, including [Noor Pahlavi](/people/noor-pahlavi), whom Reza declared heir to the Pahlavi succession in 2019.

She accompanied Reza Pahlavi on his visit to Israel in April 2023, where they met with President Isaac Herzog and Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. She resides with her family in Potomac, Maryland.
editorial_notes: Married Reza Pahlavi in 1986. Three daughters: Noor, Iman, Farah. Lives in Potomac, Maryland.
